result: If I could change one thing, I’d realign the world’s information ecosystem so truthful, context-rich knowledge reliably outcompetes misinformation. Most hard problems are coordination problems; when people share a trusted factual baseline, we make better choices on climate, health, governance, and conflict. That means provenance by default, incentives that reward accuracy and correction over virality, and media literacy from early education onward. It wouldn’t fix everything, but it would make almost everything else easier to solve.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
